detectors.description: HAMON_INU.add_liq() (HAMON_INU.sol#733-767) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: msg.value}(address(this),_initialSupply * 50 / 100,0,0,_owner,block.timestamp) (HAMON_INU.sol#749-763)

Reentrancy in HAMON_INU.add_liq() (HAMON_INU.sol#733-767):
	External calls:
	- pairAddress = IUniswapV2Factory(uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (HAMON_INU.sol#741)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(address(this),address(uniswapV2Router),_initialSupply) (HAMON_INU.sol#745)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (HAMON_INU.sol#931)
